creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)
For anyone visiting this in the future:

Each of legacy drivers (x11/nvidia-driver-[304|340|390|470] doesn't have indivisual pkg-descr and shares the one for the master port (x11/nvidia-driver).
So as x11/linux-nvidia-libs*.

FreshPorts would be showing the same contents for legacy ports.

On the other hand, graphics/nvidia-drm*-kmod has pkg-descr per-ports, to clarify the corresponding graphics/drm*-kmod ports. Note that graphics/nvidia-drm*-kmod does not support any of legacy nvidia-driver ports, as none of them have prerequisite codes in them.
